title: Raccoon Removal in Morris Heights, Bronx | $900–$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in Morris Heights, Bronx. Licensed experts serving the community near Highbridge Park & University Heights. Free inspection. Call today!
intro: Morris Heights residents know that raccoons can become persistent intruders in attics, basements, and around garbage areas, especially in the neighborhood's mix of multi-family homes and older brick apartment buildings. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal services throughout Morris Heights, from the streets near Highbridge Park to the residential blocks along Jerome Avenue. Our humane removal process ensures your property is raccoon-free and secured against future wildlife intrusions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Morris Heights and the greater Bronx for years with fast, reliable raccoon removal services. Our licensed technicians use humane trapping methods, complete exclusion repairs, and offer transparent pricing with no hidden fees.
localContext: Morris Heights' proximity to Highbridge Park and the Harlem River creates an environment where raccoons thrive and seek shelter in residential buildings, particularly the neighborhood's characteristic pre-war apartment complexes and row houses. The area's tree-lined streets and older infrastructure can provide easy access points for raccoons looking for denning sites.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Morris Heights?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Morris Heights typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, access difficulty, and necessary repairs. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before starting any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Morris Heights, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are quite common in Morris Heights due to the neighborhood's proximity to Highbridge Park and green spaces along the Harlem River. They often seek shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces of the area's older residential buildings.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Morris Heights property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service in Morris Heights for emergency raccoon situations. Most removals are completed within 3-7 days depending on the number of animals and whether babies are present, which require special care and timing.

faqs.question: Do you offer raccoon prevention services in Morris Heights?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. After removal, we provide complete exclusion services including sealing entry points, installing chimney caps, reinforcing vents, and securing potential access areas common in Morris Heights buildings. We also offer cleanup and sanitization of affected areas to prevent health hazards.
